name: Eastside Four Tray Gangster Crips
description: Eastside Four Tray Gangster Crips are an African-American street gang located on the Eastside of South Los Angeles in the old historic Central Avenue community where the Westcoast Jazz movement flourished during the 1940s and 1950s.
